# Application {#sec-application}

<!-- TODO: Develop this section with substantive content about applying the simulation findings to real-world spatial CRT design. -->

## Background of Sudden Death (SUD) in North Carolina

<!-- Content to be developed: epidemiological context of SUD in NC counties, base rate ~35/100,000, spatial clustering patterns -->

## Spatial Considerations

<!-- Content to be developed: geographic factors that create spatially heterogeneous incidence (flood risk, pollution, socioeconomic factors) -->

## Recommendations for Treatment Assignment

<!-- Content to be developed: practical guidance for applying simulation findings to design a real spatial CRT in the NC SUD context -->
